problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Acoustic. Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation directly addresses this.
